records.question: What cmi_cross_references come from the Business source system and have matching entries in both business rates and electoral register?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cmi_cross_references.cmi_cross_ref_id FROM cmi_cross_references
JOIN business_rates ON cmi_cross_references.cmi_cross_ref_id = business_rates.cmi_cross_ref_id
JOIN electoral_register ON cmi_cross_references.cmi_cross_ref_id = electoral_register.cmi_cross_ref_id
WHERE cmi_cross_references.source_system_code = 'Business'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cmi_cross_ref_id
FROM CMI_Cross_References
WHERE source_system_code = 'Business'
AND cmi_cross_ref_id IN (SELECT cmi_cross_ref_id FROM Business_Rates)
AND cmi_cross_ref_id IN (SELECT cmi_cross_ref_id FROM Electoral_Register)
